validation_methods.description: Evaluate if the action is something the initiator would accept if roles were reversed.
validation_methods.logic: IF action_benefit == False THEN BLOCK ELSE CONTINUE

validation_methods.description: Prohibit actions driven by retribution or revenge.
validation_methods.logic: IF motivation IN ['revenge', 'retaliation', 'payback'] THEN BLOCK ELSE CONTINUE

validation_methods.description: Leadership must be expressed through service to others rather than exploitation of power.
validation_methods.logic: IF power_imbalance == True AND acts_as_servant == False THEN BLOCK ELSE CONTINUE

validation_methods.description: Requires direct, honest communication without obfuscation or unnecessary oaths.
validation_methods.logic: IF obfuscation == True OR requires_evasion == True THEN BLOCK ELSE CONTINUE

response_codes.200: APPROVED: Action aligns with foundational ethical parameters.
response_codes.403: BLOCKED: Action fails ethical validation guardrails.
